DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Updates the timestamp for string flags dynamically based on changes.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players always see the most current information for game settings.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Links string flags to a dynamic repository for version tracking.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Allows players to benefit from the latest features and fixes without needing to update manually.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast string retrieval method for version tracking of flags.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves game performance by quickly accessing the latest settings for players.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Quickly updates the timestamp for string flags to reflect changes.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Provides players with immediate updates on game settings, enhancing their experience.
